focus: API input validation — Zod safeParse for comments, sections, templates routes

Imported existing CreateTemplateInput schema and added safeParse validation to POST /templates.
Imported existing UpdateTemplateInput schema and added safeParse validation to PATCH /templates/:id.
Created InstantiateTemplateInput Zod schema (variables: Record<string, string> optional) and added safeParse validation to POST /templates/:id/instantiate.
